Petition For Order Instructing Trustee'S And Passing On Proposed Acts Of Attorneys-In-Fact
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Instructing Trustee'S And Passing On Proposed Acts Of Attorneys-In-Fact
Off Calendar Mar-01-2016 Continued To Mar-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Virginia Palmer for Linda Ara.

Ms. Palmer reported that they need a continuance, that they just go the final settlement, that they are proceeding with the reverse mortgage and that Ms. Lucier is in hospice. The petition for order instructing trustee's and passing on proposed acts of attorneys-in-fact was continued to March 29, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a settlement to be in place.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
